title: invitations — scheduled tasks
description: Cron entries registered by `InvitationsServiceProvider::schedule()`. UTC throughout. `runOnOneServer` on every entry so multi-node worker pools do not duplicate work. `withoutOverlapping` where windows may exceed the interval.

entries.description: Every 15 minutes. Batches up to 500 invitations whose `expires_at < now()` into `ExpireInvitationsJob`. Frequent enough that a 14-day invitation expires within 15 minutes of the cutoff.
Daily 04:00 UTC. Soft-deletes accepted + declined invitations past the P90D retention window. Preserves InvitationEvent rows per their own retention (P1Y).
Every 6 hours. Scans soft-bounced invitations still in the retryable window + dispatches RetryBounceJob for each. Skips those exceeding the max retry attempt count.

Weekly Monday 08:00 UTC. Aggregates the previous week's funnel + bounce stats per workspace, emits a report to platform ops (via notifications), and snapshots the counts into the compliance store for SOC 2 CC7.2 evidence.
